ops.title: Enhancers annotate and demote, never gate
ops.body:
Background enhancers are incremental enhancement: fire-and-forget verification agents spawned at the main level once expand/finalists land, low priority, allowed to fail silently. The ruling that binds CLI, workflow, and skill prose:

- Results land only through `enhance merge <slug> <name>` — one flock-guarded upsert into `artifacts/enhance-<name>.json`; later `checked_at` wins. Never `trip artifact write` (whole-file, clobbers under concurrent finishers).
- Enhancers never mutate journeys, never re-pair, never write trip.json/prefs, never block the walk or the board. expand.json bytes must not churn (upstream fingerprints).
- Ordering effects are demote-only: `gone`/`degraded` on a matched leg yields a deterministic `demote` verdict in the `availability_verified` factor lane; `confirmed`/`inconclusive` annotate as rank-entry facts, never a verdict — a promote would make ordering depend on verifier reach.
- A verified-gone finalist keeps its board row with a prominent flag; a row the user has seen never disappears.
- Freshness fold: `enhance-verify.json` is an input of exactly rank + finalize; a merge flips only those two (quota-free, sub-second) via `_upstream_fp`, with absent artifacts hashing `_ABSENT` so the first render is unblocked.
- Auth lanes v1: public award pages first, `abwc-seed --session verify-<program>` for cookie-class hosts; token/device-wall lane deferred until cookiesync's native CDP path lands. A verifier never runs `cookiesync auth`.

Decided 2026-07-13 with the user (plan "we-should-add-some-gentle-treehouse"); documented in skills/getaway/references/enhancers.md and doctrine.md.
